name: She Was Fingering Herself to You... Then FOSE Hit
description:
She was thinking about you... and it turned into a complete, irreversible mess.

Unknown to you and Ashley, a bizarre phenomenon known as FOSE has been secretly occurring around the world. It usually strikes celebrities and stunning women, swapping their bodies with whoever they’re fantasizing about at the moment of climax.

This time... it’s going to happen to two completely ordinary people — you and the quiet girl sitting a few desks away.

And when she does... everything changes in the blink of an eye.
